verdict.rationale: Q2 2026 net revenue of EUR 21.895M (v2 finance pack, explicitly the final restatement that supersedes the preliminary v1 of 21.712M, approved 15 July 2026) divided by period-end FTE of 224 (operations pack) equals EUR 97,745.54, matching the claim exactly within the 0.2% formula tolerance; the Q2 commentary prose independently cites EUR 21.89M, corroborating the v2 figure.

evidence.span_text: PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2.
Net revenue reached EUR 21.89 million, with the gross result at EUR 13.03 million and an adjusted operating result of EUR 5.75 million.

final_text:
Explicit supersession confirmed:
- v1: "PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2."
- v2: "Final restatement, approved 15 July 2026."

So v2 net revenue (21.895M) is current authoritative; v1 (21.712M) is outdated. Formula check: 21,895,000 ÷ 224 FTE = 97,745.54, matching the claim exactly (within 0.2% tolerance). The commentary prose also cites 21.89M, corroborating v2.
